# What this changes

Brief description of what you changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Improved template (guardian, domain, or review)
- [ ] New example
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Failure mode addressed (link issue)

## What failure mode does this address?

"This is better" is not sufficient.
"This prevents X, which I encountered when Y" is.

## Checklist

- [ ] Based on a real failure mode, not a hypothetical
- [ ] No existing constraints removed
- [ ] Templates remain generic (not product-specific)
